semantic.role: CLI command adapter for executing the usage report, defined as the usage command entry point.
responsibilities: Defines the command-line options interface (ExecuteUsageCommandOptions) specifying the required root directory.
Invokes the usage report engine (runUsageReport) with the provided root directory and the default runtime I/O instance.
outOfScope: Does not implement any usage report generation logic.
Does not handle CLI argument parsing or output formatting.
Does not touch persistence or pipeline orchestration.
invariants: Must remain a thin adapter; no usage business logic should be added.
Must not import or call services, core, or persistence layers directly.
The defaultRuntimeIO dependency ensures I/O abstraction.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Thin CLI command entry point that delegates usage reporting to the engine layer, preserving separation of concerns.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Introduced in ArchSpine v1.0.0 to provide a dedicated CLI command for usage reports, following the CLI entrypoint separation rule.

English.role: CLI command adapter for executing the usage report, defined as the usage command entry point.
responsibilities: Defines the command-line options interface (ExecuteUsageCommandOptions) specifying the required root directory.
Invokes the usage report engine (runUsageReport) with the provided root directory and the default runtime I/O instance.
outOfScope: Does not implement any usage report generation logic.
Does not handle CLI argument parsing or output formatting.
Does not touch persistence or pipeline orchestration.

Simplified Chinese.role: 用于执行使用情况报告的CLI命令适配器，作为 usage 命令的入口点。
responsibilities: 定义命令选项接口 (ExecuteUsageCommandOptions)，指定必需的根目录参数。
使用提供的根目录和默认运行时 IO 实例调用使用情况报告引擎 (runUsageReport)。
outOfScope: 不实现任何使用情况报告的生成逻辑。
不处理 CLI 参数解析或输出格式化。
不涉及持久化或流程编排。
